labels.analysis: The MCP Server "io.github.TrackingTime/mcp-server" provides 16 tools focused on productivity tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation, data access and reading. Key tools: mcp_get_me, mcp_workspaces_list, mcp_events_list, mcp_events_company_list, mcp_events_get.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Productivity" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: task, project.
labels.tool_verified_reason:
auth error in response: event: message
data: {"result":{"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Missing credentials: provide app_p

tools.name: mcp_get_me
tools.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile from /me (user_id, account_id and identity fields). Use this first to discover account context before calling list/get tools. Limitations: read-only; requires valid credentials via app_password/api_token or X-API-Key; does not return full account-wide analytics.

tools.name: mcp_workspaces_list
tools.description: Lists available workspaces/accounts for the authenticated user, including account_id and selected workspace flag. Use this when multiple workspaces exist and you need to choose account_id before other tools.

tools.name: mcp_events_list
tools.description: Lists time events from /events for a date range. Supports filters by USER, PROJECT, CUSTOMER, TASK, or COMPANY, plus pagination and sort order. If filter/id are missing, it defaults to USER and auto-resolves the caller user_id. For global account-level events, set filter=COMPANY (or use mcp_events_company_list). Limitations: from and to are required; results are paginated; only returns data accessible to the authenticated account.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_events_company_list
tools.description: Lists company-level events from /events using filter=COMPANY. Use this for global metrics (for example, total hours by user in a period) without iterating user-by-user. Requires from/to and does not require id.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_events_get
tools.description: Fetches one time event by event_id from /events/{id}. Use when you already have an event identifier and need full event detail. Limitations: requires a valid event_id in the same accessible account context; read-only.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_users_list
tools.description: Lists account users from /users. Supports filters and optional billing/team/employee expansion. Use this to discover users before calling user-specific tools. Limitations: read-only; visibility depends on role permissions (typically admin/project manager for full account listing).

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_user_get
tools.description: Gets a single user from /users/:id. Use when you already have a user id and need detailed profile data. Limitations: read-only; access to other users depends on role permissions.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_user_tasks_list
tools.description: Lists tasks assigned to a user from /users/:id/assigned_tasks, grouped by project. By default (without filter) this endpoint returns the user's active assigned tasks. Use filter only when you explicitly need another subset (ALL, ARCHIVED, TRACKING). If filter is not provided, it is not sent to the API. Limitations: read-only; visibility depends on account permissions.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_user_projects_list
tools.description: Lists projects assigned to a user from /users/:user_id/projects. Use to scope project context for a specific person. Limitations: read-only; returns only projects visible in the authenticated account context.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_user_trackables_list
tools.description: Lists user trackables from /users/:id/trackables (projects and tasks grouped by project). Supports favorite-only mode and project/task filtering options. Limitations: read-only; payload size can grow on large accounts.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_projects_list
tools.description: Lists projects from /projects with optional status filter (ALL, ACTIVE, ARCHIVED). Use for project discovery before task/event queries. Limitations: read-only listing; filter values are restricted to ALL/ACTIVE/ARCHIVED.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_tasks_list
tools.description: Lists tasks from /tasks, optionally scoped by project_id and status filter (ALL, ACTIVE, ARCHIVED). Use after selecting a project to narrow task context. Limitations: read-only; project_id must exist in the same account context when provided.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_tasks_add
tools.description: Creates a new task using POST /tasks/add. Supports assigning users, linking to a project, custom fields and billable flag. Limitations: write operation; requires permissions to create tasks in the target account/project.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_task_get
tools.description: Gets a specific task from /tasks/:task_id. Use when you need full task details by id. Supports include_custom_fields. Limitations: read-only; task must belong to the authenticated account context.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_customers_list
tools.description: Lists customers from /customers with optional status filter (ALL, ACTIVE, ARCHIVED). Use to map customer entities before querying related projects/events. Limitations: read-only listing; filter values are restricted to ALL/ACTIVE/ARCHIVED.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

tools.name: mcp_services_list
tools.description: Lists services from /services with optional status filter (ALL, ACTIVE, ARCHIVED). Use to inspect service catalog metadata used in time tracking. Limitations: read-only listing; filter values are restricted to ALL/ACTIVE/ARCHIVED.

account_id.description: TrackingTime workspace/account ID. Required when the user belongs to multiple workspaces.

server_info_crawled.name: io.github.TrackingTime/mcp-server
